data.name: STEPMOM: Milf Scandal 💖
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to the world of scandals, intrigue and incredible investigations in STEPMOM: Milf Scandal 💖! To become a player in this visual novel for adults means to get into the whirlwind of real journalistic leaks and adventures.

Meet the protagonist, Adam, who has decided to take his fate into his own hands and work for a small but ambitious news blog. Fully committed to his task, he is forced to come up with extraordinary news about his town to keep the audience interested.

But it's not as easy as it sounds. Not only does Adam need talent and ingenuity, but he also needs to be able to keep his job, which is in danger of fading away. In search of sensations and investigations, he finds himself in the thicket of intrigue, uncovering secrets that could change everything.

Adam lives in a small town with his stepmother and half-sister. It's a special relationship that adds new dimensions to his everyday life, creating additional challenges and unexpected turns of events.

Backed by a dynamic story, you will be immersed in a world of unforgettable adventures and choices that will determine the fate of Adam and his blog. Get ready for sleepless nights, feel the adrenaline of uncovering the truth and deep secrets of a small town. STEPMOM: Milf Scandal 💖 is more than a game. It's an unforgettable journey into the world of scandals and romance that will leave you wanting to learn more and return to this fascinating world again and again.

Features
  • VN Style story with dynamic camera angles, and outfits you select
  • An immersive storyline filled with emotional twists and moments that will make your heart race
  • Embark on a journey that will connect you with a world of your fantasies and the search for truth
  • Make crucial choices that will determine the fate of the character and his path to victory
  • Diverse characters, each with unique personality traits and backgrounds, making your journey even more intriguing

data.short_description: Welcome to the world of scandals, intrigue and incredible investigations in STEPMOM: Milf Scandal 💖! To become a player in this visual novel for adults means to get into the whirlwind of real journalistic leaks and adventures.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Vietnamese, Greek, Danish, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Norwegian, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Romanian, Thai, Turkish, Hungarian, Ukrainian, Finnish, Czech, Swedish, Japanese, Indonesian, Spanish - Latin America

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 or above
  • Processor: Intel or AMD
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Direct X compatible
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
